case_title: ALAN BENDIT VS. MARIE KODERA et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENDIT, ALAN
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-29-2011 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.

CASE MANAGEMENT MOTION, DEPARTMENT 610, PLAINTIFF ALAN BENDIT'S MOTION TO VACATE ORDER TO ARBITRATION AND TO ORDER MEDIATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION, THE TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT THE MOTION IS ADOPTED. THE MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. THE CASE IS ORDERED REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. THE CASE IS ORDERED SCHEDULED FOR A JURY TRIAL ON 7/23/2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. THE COURT SHALL GIVE NOTICE OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT ORDERED A MEDIATION COMPLIANCE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON 4/25/2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)

Notice And Motion To Vacate Order To Arbitration And To Order Mediation; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Alan Bendit's Motion To Vacate Order To Arbitration And To Order Mediation is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection, the tentative ruling to grant the motion is adopted. The motion is ordered granted. The case is ordered removed from judicial arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. The case is ordered scheduled for a jury trial on 7/23/2012 at 9:30 AM in Department 206. The court shall give notice of the trial date. The court ordered a mediation compliance order to show cause on 4/25/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
